title: Redis client + stream helpers
acceptance_criteria: src/redis/client.ts exports a Redis client instance created from REDIS_URL env var using the 'ioredis' package
Exports streamPublish(stream: string, fields: Record<string, string>): Promise<string> — uses XADD with auto-generated ID ('*'); returns the message ID

Exports streamConsume(stream: string, group: string, consumer: string, handler: (id: string, fields: Record<string, string>) => Promise<void>, opts?: { blockMs?: number, count?: number }): void — creates the consumer group (XGROUP CREATE ... MKSTREAM) if it does not exist; reads with XREADGROUP; calls handler for each message; calls XACK after handler resolves successfully; if handler throws, does NOT ACK (message stays pending)
Exports recoverPending(stream: string, group: string, consumer: string): Promise<string[]> — uses XAUTOCLAIM (Redis 7+) to claim messages pending > 60s; returns their IDs so caller can replay them
Exports closeRedis(): Promise<void> for graceful shutdown
Three stream names exported as constants: STREAM_TICKS = 'market.ticks', STREAM_STRADDLE = 'straddle.values', STREAM_SIGNALS = 'signals.generated'
All exports are named exports (no default exports)
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
